case_title: LAIR, JEAN CLAUDE vs. MINHAS, SHERI SINGH et al

CBEA, JUDGE; REDWARDS, CLERK; KGILLETT, CSR C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. PLNTF APPR BY HENRY SHAIN, ESQ, DEF. APPR IN PRO PER. MATTER SETTLED AT TRIAL. DEF TO VACATE PREMISES AT 1388 CALIFORNIA STREET #303A, SAN FRANCISCO, CA BY 23 OCT 99 IN EXCHANGE FOR $300. FAILURE TO VACATE BY 23 OCT 99 GIVES PLNTF RIGHT TO EXPARTE APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF EXECUTION ON 10 NOV 99, TOGETHER WITH DEMAND FOR $2000 BACK RENT AND RIGHT TO ANY PERSONAL POSSESSION REMAINING IN PREMISES.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MINHAS, SHERI SINGH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1388 CALIFORNIA STREET, ROOM 303A, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL NOV-09-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, PLNTF WAIVES BACK RENT OF $2000 IF DENENDANT MOVES BY NOON, NOV 9, 1999. IF BREACHED, PLNTF SHALL HAVE JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR $2000 PLUS COSTS. IF COMPLIED WITH, PLNTF SHALL SET ASIDE THIS JUDGMENT.
